name: Nevada Copper Corp.
description: Nevada Copper Corp. is a Canadian-based mining company primarily focused on the development and operation of its 100%-owned Pumpkin Hollow copper project. Located in the Walker Lane mineralized belt of Western Nevada, the Pumpkin Hollow property is an advanced-stage asset that includes both underground and open-pit mining operations. The company is dedicated to the responsible exploration and production of copper, aiming to provide significant value to its stakeholders while contributing to the global supply of this essential industrial metal. Nevada Copper is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NCU.
